testcase.name: shouldThrowLoginServiceUnavailableExceptionWhenServiceIsDown
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.964 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-4', type='PIX', amount='100.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.964 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-4' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.965 [main] ERROR c.t.service.TransactionService - Unexpected error processing transaction for customerId='customer-4': LoginService is unavailable com.transactionservice.exception.LoginServiceUnavailableException: LoginService is unavailable at com.transactionservice.infrastructure.client.LoginClient.getSession(LoginClient.java:35) at com.transactionservice.service.TransactionService.lambda$fetchAndValidateSession$0(TransactionService.java:111) at io.micrometer.core.instrument.AbstractTimer.record(AbstractTimer.java:190) at com.transactionservice.service.TransactionService.fetchAndValidateSession(TransactionService.java:111) at com.transactionservice.service.TransactionService.processTransaction(TransactionService.java:73) at com.transactionservice.service.TransactionServiceTest.lambda$shouldThrowLoginServiceUnavailableExceptionWhenServiceIsDown$2(TransactionServiceTest.java:124) at org.assertj.core.api.ThrowableAssert.catchThrowable(ThrowableAssert.java:63) at org.assertj.core.api.AssertionsForClassTypes.catchThrowable(AssertionsForClassTypes.java:904) at testcase.name: shouldProcessInvestimentoTransaction
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.975 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-6', type='INVESTIMENTO', amount='10000.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.975 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-6' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.976 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Session validated: username='customer-6', contractService='true' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.977 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction processed successfully: customerId='customer-6', type='INVESTIMENTO'

testcase.name: shouldThrowBusinessExceptionWhenContractServiceIsFalse
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.986 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-2', type='PIX', amount='100.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.987 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-2' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.987 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Session validated: username='customer-2', contractService='false' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.987 [main] WARN c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction rejected: customerId='customer-2', reason='Cliente não possui serviço contratado'

testcase.name: shouldThrowBusinessExceptionWhenChannelIsNotMobile
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.991 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-3', type='PIX', amount='100.00', channel='WEB' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.991 [main] WARN c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction rejected: customerId='customer-3', reason='Channel 'WEB' is not allowed. Only MOBILE transactions are accepted.'

testcase.name: shouldThrowBusinessExceptionForInvalidAmount
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.995 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-5', type='PAGAMENTO', amount='0', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:30.996 [main] WARN c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction rejected: customerId='customer-5', reason='Transaction amount must be greater than zero'

testcase.name: shouldProcessValidPixTransaction
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:31.001 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-1', type='PIX', amount='500.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:31.001 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-1' 2026-04-24 18:43:31.002 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Session validated: username='customer-1', contractService='true' 2026-04-24 18:43:31.002 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction processed successfully: customerId='customer-1', type='PIX'
